Off Calendar Aug-07-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Imelda Rankins-Devoine, Respondent/Plaintiff.
Claire Rankins, Appellant/Defendant.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are affirmed.

Imelda Rankins-Devoine testifies on her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1 - letter to Claire Rankins and copies of 2 checks (4 pages)

Claire Rankins testifies on her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 100 - Letter with attachments addressed to Claire Rankins (4 pages)

Parties present their closing arguments.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-03-2014 Judgment Entered
